touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach to Zoey Hall at ZenFoundry introducing our automation platform for sales teams. Highlighted rep productivity gains and offered to share a brief overview call.
next_steps: Zoey to review materials and confirm interest in intro call

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking if Zoey had a chance to review our platform. Shared a case study on sales team productivity improvements and proposed times for a 15-minute qualification call.

questions_asked.question: What specific automation capabilities do you offer for sales workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Our platform provides unlimited automation for outreach sequences, follow-ups, data entry, and pipeline management tasks that typically consume 40% of rep time.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Brief qualification call with Zoey to understand ZenFoundry's sales process and current pain points. Discussed team size, existing tools, and automation needs. Zoey confirmed budget authority and timeline.

questions_asked.question: What are the biggest time drains for your sales team right now?
questions_asked.answer: Manual follow-ups and CRM data entry. Our reps spend almost half their day on administrative tasks instead of selling.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for initial setup, with full team onboarding complete within 30 days.

next_steps: Send discovery questionnaire
Schedule deeper discovery session with Zoey and sales managers

touches.ai_summary: Discovery follow-up email recapping qualification call insights. Sent detailed questionnaire about current tech stack, team structure, and success metrics. Proposed agenda for technical evaluation session.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and email system?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with all major CRMs and email platforms. We'll cover the technical setup in detail during the eval session.

next_steps: Zoey to complete questionnaire
Schedule technical evaluation with Aiden Wagner included

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation session (rescheduled from previous week). Walked through platform capabilities with Zoey and Aiden Wagner. Demonstrated automation workflows, integration setup, and reporting dashboards. Discussed 8-seat deployment for sales team.

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the automation workflows for our specific sales process?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable. You can build workflows with our drag-and-drop builder or use our template library as a starting point.

questions_asked.question: What does your current process look like for lead follow-up?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual. Reps set their own reminders and there's no consistent cadence across the team.

questions_asked.question: What kind of training and support do you provide during rollout?
questions_asked.answer: White-glove onboarding with dedicated success manager, live training sessions, and 24/7 support access.

objections: We've looked at automation tools before and found them too complex for our team to actually adopt.
next_steps: Send ROI calculator based on 8 seats
Introduce exec team for buy-in conversation
Schedule proposal review

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Zoey to discuss business case, ROI projections, and implementation plan. Reviewed pricing for 8-seat unlimited automation package ($8,100 ACV). Zoey expressed strong interest but noted need to move quickly.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in the final decision?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority for this. Aiden and the sales team are already aligned on the need.

questions_asked.question: What does the onboarding timeline look like if we sign this month?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within one week of contract signature and have your team live within 3 weeks.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on contract length?
questions_asked.answer: We typically start with annual agreements, but can discuss options that align with your budget cycle.

next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing breakdown
Zoey to review internally with finance
Schedule follow-up to address questions

touches.ai_summary: Quick follow-up call with Zoey to address questions on contract terms and implementation logistics. Confirmed 8-seat count and unlimited automation tier. Discussed payment terms and start date preferences.

questions_asked.question: Can we add seats mid-contract if the team grows?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. We can add seats anytime with pro-rated pricing for the remainder of the term.

next_steps: Zoey to finalize budget approval
Send contract for review
Schedule negotiation call if needed

touches.ai_summary: Email following up on proposal review. Zoey confirmed budget is approved and asked about potential discount for annual pre-payment. Sent updated pricing options and contract for legal review.

questions_asked.question: Is there a discount available if we pay annually upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer 5% off for annual pre-payment. I'll send updated pricing reflecting that option.

next_steps: Zoey to coordinate legal review
Schedule pricing discussion call to finalize terms

touches.ai_summary: Pricing and terms discussion with Zoey to finalize contract details. Confirmed 8 seats at $8,100 ACV with annual billing. Addressed remaining questions on implementation timeline and success metrics. Zoey committed to signature pending final legal clearance.

questions_asked.question: What's your ideal go-live date?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to be up and running by the start of next quarter, so within the next 4-5 weeks.

questions_asked.question: How do you measure success in the first 90 days?
questions_asked.answer: We track time saved on administrative tasks, follow-up consistency, and pipeline velocity. You'll have a dashboard showing all these metrics in real-time.

next_steps: Zoey to route contract through legal (2-3 days)
Prep onboarding kickoff materials
Target signature by end of week
